title: Anti Dupe Detecor
description: This plugin detects dupes on your server to keep it safe.
body:
[Discord](https://discord.gg/XjcMr6GZqC) - Report bugs!⚠️

# 🛡️ AntiDupeDetector

Lightweight **zero-false-flag** dupe detection for **Minecraft 1.21+**.
If it flags, it's real — no noise, no spam, no false positives.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🔥 Illegal Stack Detection

Always enabled, 0% false flags.
Flags only *mathematically impossible* items:

* 80× Totems
* 120× Shulker Boxes
* 200× Diamonds

---

### 🧩 NBT Clone Detection *(Optional)*

Disabled by default.
Detects huge amounts of **identical NBT items** inside one container:

* Cloned shulkers
* Copied totems
* Duplicate non-stackables

---

### 📈 Burst Gain Detection *(Optional)*

Disabled by default.
Detects extremely fast gains of high-value items.
Useful for catching shulker/ground/hopper dupes when enabled.

---

## 📊 Staff GUI

`/antidupe gui` opens a clean, paginated interface:

* Player heads 👤
* Alert types & reasons
* Time, location & suspicion
* Page arrows ⬅️➡️

Designed for fast staff review.

---

## ⚙️ Commands

```
/antidupe alerts   → Toggle alerts
/antidupe gui      → Open alert viewer
/antidupe reload   → Reload config
```

---

## 🚀 Highlights

* 🧼 Zero clutter
* ⚡ Super lightweight
* 🛡️ Only true dupes flagged
* 🔋 No async inventory edits (0% dupe risk)
* 🟢 Fully Folia-compatible
* 🗂️ Clean GUI with pagination

---

## 📌 Supported Platforms

* Spigot
* Paper
* Purpur
* Folia
  (Minecraft **1.21+**)
